overview.title: Program
overview.intro: The Germany Care Path Program is designed to support Kenyan Certified Nursing Assistants (CNAs), nurses, and health support workers in securing employment opportunities in Germany. The comprehensive package includes:

features.title: German Language Training
features.desc: A1 to B2 level + healthcare terminology

programTypes.title: Program Types
programTypes.subtitle: Choose the path that matches your qualifications and goals

cards.title: Ausbildung
cards.subtitle: Vocational Apprenticeship Program
features: Leads to permanent residency after completion

cards.title: Caregiver Pathway
cards.subtitle: With or Without Recognition
features: Direct placement into elder care facilities
Eligible for permanent residency after qualification and employment

investment.title: Investment Breakdown
investment.footnote: Flexible payment plans available in KES equivalent

items.title: Competitive Salaries
items.desc: Starting salaries of €2,300–€3,000/month for nurses with recognized qualifications

items.title: Relocation Support
items.desc: Assistance with housing, bank accounts, and integration into German life

items.title: Legal Migration
items.desc: Full compliance with German immigration laws and employment regulations

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.disclaimer: Requirements may vary depending on the German state, employer, and recognition authority. Final eligibility is assessed individually during the application process.

cta.title: Start Your German Healthcare Career Today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Kenyan healthcare professionals who have successfully made the move. Your journey starts with a quick eligibility check.

images.eligibility: Kenyan nurse in a German hospital
images.customerCare: Customer care team supporting healthcare professionals on their pathway to Germany
